let step = 0; const total = 4; const next = document.getElementById('next-btn'); const prev = document.getElementById('prev-btn'); const stepsEls = document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step'); const panelsEls = document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-panel'); function render() { stepsEls.forEach((el, i) => { el.classList.toggle('active', i === step); el.classList.toggle('done', i < step); }); panelsEls.forEach((el, i) => el.classList.toggle('active', i === step)); prev.disabled = step === 0; prev.style.opacity = step === 0 ? '.5' : '1'; next.textContent = step === total - 1 ? 'Finish' : 'Next →'; } next.addEventListener('click', () => { if (step < total - 1) { step++; render(); } }); prev.addEventListener('click', () => { if (step > 0) { step--; render(); } });
